{# find_contacts_status.html — in-progress poller for the vendor AI contact finder. Rendered by vendor_find_contacts (POST) right after it schedules the background AI web search, and by vendor_find_contacts_status (GET) while the run is still in flight. The div polls its own status route every 3s (hx-target="this" so it swaps into ITSELF, never the whole #main-content; hx-push-url="false" so the poll never rewrites the URL); when the background search finishes the route returns the refreshed find_contacts_results.html with HTTP 286, so htmx swaps the results in and stops polling. Receives: vendor (VendorCard). Called by: vendors.py vendor_find_contacts + vendor_find_contacts_status. #}
Finding contacts…

Searching the web with AI — this can take up to a minute.
